name: the-square-space-age
title: The Square: Space Age
author: mmmatt
description:
The Square: Space Age is the Space Age add-on mod for The Square and requires both the base mod and the Space Age expansion.
It extends the square challenge toward planet-specific Square expansion research and one square per supported planet.

This mod is pre-alpha and currently in the middle of the architecture refactor from single-surface vanilla logic to planet-scoped Space Age logic.

Feedback: Join the discord! https://discord.gg/HytACasPxY

Disclaimer: This mod’s code was primarily AI-generated using GPT-5.4 with Codex, with human direction, review, and iteration.
